user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee life event type, so that significant events like marriage, adoption or birth can be recorded
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Life Event Types screen; When I click Add new employee life event type and enter a name and description; Then the life event type is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all life event types with name and description, so that I can review the configured events
acceptance_criteria: Given life event types exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Name and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing life event type, so that I can keep the event definitions accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a life event type is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated type is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the life event types list, so that I see the current set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Life Event Types screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads
